canonical_checkout.role: canonical Genes checkout for genes-ts compiler work

source_comparison.recursive_diff: canonical checkout differs from the Cafetera vendored reference after import-attribute, dynamicImport typing, Rest alias type-emission, async/await metadata, TS raw-type helper, TSX inline markup, enum abstract literal-union follow-up work, Undefinable object-field codegen, target-polymorphic helper docs, and optional-field boolean branch narrowing landed

decision.policy: Fix genes-ts limitations directly in ../genes as generic compiler work, then update this pin after OpenCodeHX gates pass. Do not vendor Genes into opencodehx by default.
